text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature has managed to leave her mark on
the Twinkle Series.

Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

One day, while still basking in the glory of our
accomplishments...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Sorry for the wait.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
My hair is not holding together well... despite the
hair oil I put in last night.
choice_data_list: You look the same as usual.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh. Okay.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Same as usual, huh? I guess I should be glad.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I think I put a decent amount of effort into my
appearance, but good to know people can't tell
the difference.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat? Come on, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You should keep comments like that to yourself,
okay?

Nice Nature has come so far over the past three
years. Perhaps it feels so pronounced because she
can so confidently express herself now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, why don't we start heading out?

Nice Nature and I head to the shopping district
that she often hangs out at. Apparently, there's a
festival going on there.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's just a small community festival, so don't
expect anything extravagant.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But everyone is really invested in this, so it should
be pretty interesting—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, Kimie!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text: Hey, Natie! You came!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Of course! And it wouldn't be a party without my
trainer here!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, are you turning our festival into a date?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Come ooon, that joke's getting old.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to be shy! Well, I gotta go help
with some things, so I'll see you later!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Later!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Goodness gracious. Always teasing me about it
being a date... What is she, twelve?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's embarrassing! ...Hehe.

We have a great time exploring the festival stalls
and attractions together. Afterward...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That was fun! Everyone was so enthusiastic as
always.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wasn't the butcher's stall amazing? I wonder if
they were able to sell all of the fried chicken
cakes after all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: By the way... you sure are carrying a lot.

She's not wrong. I received many souvenirs from
the people of the shopping district while we
walked around.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Don't. Everyone likes you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Maybe they were nice to you before just because
you're my trainer, but that's not the case now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They just think you're a good person now.
Probably.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, did you have fun today?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Really? You're not just saying that to make me
feel better?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Because... I'm not a bright, fun-loving girl.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I can never say what I'm thinking outright either. I
have to beat around the bush, which probably
comes off as annoying.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But even still, you keep me company even outside
of training like this.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...I just hope it's not out of a sense of obligation
or kindness.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I want you to spend time with me because you
actually want to...
choice_data_list: Well, I do want to spend time with you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Seriously? For real?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Then... how important am I to you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and don't say "third important." It's not really
the time to make jokes.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I can't force you to answer that question,
but...
choice_data_list: Of course you're my number one.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Siiiiigh...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
See, I'm such a pain, aren't I? I'm regretting it
now, thinking I made you say that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But you're not totally innocent either.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It was you who said I could show even my most
embarrassing side.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So... it's too late to say you regret picking me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Cause I'll never let anyone steal my number one
spot in your heart!
